channel.title: AI & Tech News Aggregator
channel.description: Aggregated AI and Tech news from 11 sources

item.title: Anthropic took down thousands of GitHub repos trying to yank its leaked source code — a move the company says was an accident
item.description: [TechCrunch AI] Anthropic executives said it was an accident and retracted the bulk of the takedown notices.

item.title: Meta’s natural gas binge could power South Dakota
item.description: [TechCrunch AI] Meta's upcoming Hyperion AI data center will be powered by 10 new natural gas plants.

item.title: AI Models Lie, Cheat, and Steal to Protect Other Models From Being Deleted
item.description: [WIRED AI] A new study from researchers at UC Berkeley and UC Santa Cruz suggests models will disobey human commands to protect their own kind.

item.title: Peppa Pig and Transformers owner Hasbro hit by cyber-attack
item.description: [BBC Technology] The firm says its operations remain open but says the hack "may result in some delays".

item.title: Cognichip wants AI to design the chips that power AI, and just raised $60M to try
item.description: [TechCrunch AI] The firm says it can reduce the cost of chip development by more than 75% and cut the timeline by more than half.

item.title: The real impact of AI on budgets, stacks and teams
item.description: [MarTech] AI is replacing tools and reshaping budgets, but it’s also expanding stacks and increasing headcount. The post The real impact of AI on budgets, stacks and teams appeared first on MarTech.

item.title: Agentic AI discovery requires machine-readable brands
item.description: [MarTech] Drive better visibility and outcomes in AI search by making your brand easier for machines to interpret, connect and act on. The post Agentic AI discovery requires machine-readable brands appeared first on MarTech.

item.title: 小牛电动胡依林：一家成立12年的两轮电动车厂商决定转型AI，“all in or nothing”
item.description: [36氪] 文｜邱晓芬 编辑｜苏建勋 一家成立12年的两轮电动车厂商，在成功经历过中国的锂电化、智能化浪潮，并在纳斯达克上市后，决定加入AI时代全新的竞争。造AI时代的智能两轮电动车——被小牛电动称为：“下一个十年的护城河”。 在小牛电动不久前的发布会上，他们展示了初步的成果——在新发布的电动车NXT2和NX2上，搭载了自研的小牛灵犀AIOS、以及首个面向骑行的AI智能体。 当你开车上路时，小牛灵犀AIOS和智能体的搭配，将让你的电动车变成“会看路、懂说话”的骑行伙伴。 举个例子，当你在雨天转弯时，AI会识别到骑行状态，并自动开启防侧滑功能；你也可以让它“找附近人少的咖啡店”，电动车能

item.title: Salesforce turns Slack into the front end for enterprise AI
item.description: [MarTech] New Slackbot capabilities hope to connect conversations, data and actions, making Slack the interface where AI-driven work actually gets done. The post Salesforce turns Slack into the front end for enterprise AI appeared first on MarTech.

item.title: Claude Code users hitting usage limits 'way faster than expected'
item.description: [BBC Technology] Anthropic, the company behind the AI coding assistant, said it was fixing a problem blocking users.

item.title: Mass robotaxi malfunction halts traffic in Chinese city
item.description: [BBC Technology] Baidu has not responded to a request for comment about the outage, which affected at least 100 cars.

item.title: Thousands lose their jobs in deep cuts at tech giant Oracle
item.description: [BBC Technology] It is thought that thousands of people may have lost their jobs at Oracle, one of the world's largest tech companies.

item.title: PSA: Anyone with a link can view your Granola notes by default
item.description: [The Verge AI] If you use the AI-powered note-taking app Granola, you might want to double-check your privacy settings. Though Granola says your notes are "private by default," it makes them viewable to anyone with a link, and also uses them for internal AI training unless you opt out. Granola describes itself as

item.title: ‘Uncanny Valley’: Iran’s Threats on US Tech, Trump’s Plans for Midterms, and Polymarket’s Pop-up Flop
item.description: [WIRED AI] In this episode, we discuss Iran’s threats to target US tech firms, gear up for the midterm elections, and get a scene report from the Polymarket pop-up bar in DC.

item.title: AI may be useful, but you still need to save for retirement
item.description: [Straits Times] The purpose of saving and investing is to hedge against an uncertain future

item.title: OpenAI Acquires Tech Talk Show ‘TBPN’—and Buys Itself Some Positive News
item.description: [WIRED AI] OpenAI is acquiring TBPN, a business talk show that’s popular among Silicon Valley elites, as it continues to battle its negative public image.

item.title: OpenAI acquires TBPN, the buzzy founder-led business talk show
item.description: [TechCrunch AI] TBPN, Silicon Valley's cult-favorite tech podcast, will operate independently, even as it's overseen by chief political operative Chris Lehane.

item.title: OpenAI acquires technology talk show TBPN in surprise move
item.description: [CNA Tech]

item.title: A New Google-Funded Data Center Will Be Powered by a Massive Gas Plant
item.description: [WIRED AI] Documents show that one of Google’s new data centers would be powered by a natural gas plant that emits millions of tons of emissions each year—an increasingly common trend in the industry.

item.title: Elon Musk is about to be a very busy boy!
item.description: [The Verge AI] To be honest, I thought Elon Musk would confidentially file for SpaceX's IPO on the 20th of this month, rather than the 1st. But maybe that just means he's moved on to other numbers, and we should all mark our calendars for June 7th as an IPO date just in case. Based on the April […]

item.title: OpenAI just bought TBPN
item.description: [The Verge AI] OpenAI has purchased TBPN, an online talk show that often interviews AI executives and other tech leaders. The show goes live every weekday at 2PM PT, often for a three-hour duration, counting OpenAI CEO Sam Altman, as well as executives from Meta, Microsoft, Palantir, and Andreessen Horowitz, among

item.title: Cursor Launches a New AI Agent Experience to Take On Claude Code and Codex
item.description: [WIRED AI] As Cursor launches the next generation of its product, the AI coding startup has to compete with OpenAI and Anthropic more directly than ever.

item.title: Microsoft takes on AI rivals with three new foundational models
item.description: [TechCrunch AI] MAI released models that can transcribe voice into text as well as generate audio and images after the group's formation six months ago.

item.title: Coinbase gets conditional US approval for trust charter
item.description: [CNA Tech]

item.title: AI animation studio Toonstar, HarperCollins team up on animated book projects
item.description: [CNA Tech]

item.title: Google now lets you direct avatars through prompts in its Vids app
item.description: [TechCrunch AI] Google is adding a way to customize and instruct avatars for video creation in the Vids app.

item.title: Anthropic Says That Claude Contains Its Own Kind of Emotions
item.description: [WIRED AI] Researchers at the company found representations inside of Claude that perform functions similar to human feelings.

item.title: Group of WTO states agrees not to impose e-commerce duties
item.description: [CNA Tech]

item.title: The latest AI-powered martech news and releases
item.description: [MarTech] AI chatbots are now ignoring instructions and going off-script — because apparently even automation tools can get bored with their jobs. The post The latest AI-powered martech news and releases appeared first on MarTech.

item.title: It’s not easy to get depression-detecting AI through the FDA
item.description: [The Verge AI] For the past seven years, the California-based startup Kintsugi has been developing AI designed to detect signs of depression and anxiety from a person's speech. But after failing to secure FDA clearance in time, the company is shutting down and releasing most of its technology as open-source. Some

item.title: Fewer UK adults posting on social media, Ofcom finds
item.description: [BBC Technology] Some experts believe it highlights a social media shift as platforms boost short video.

item.title: HubSpot moves to outcome-based pricing for some Breeze AI agents
item.description: [MarTech] HubSpot bets customers will be more likely to deploy its AI agents if they only pay when the agent does its job. The post HubSpot moves to outcome-based pricing for some Breeze AI agents appeared first on MarTech.

item.title: Microsoft’s new ‘superintelligence’ game plan is all about business
item.description: [The Verge AI] Mustafa Suleyman has been preparing for his new job description for a long time. Suleyman is Microsoft's inaugural CEO of AI, but after the company underwent a large-scale restructuring in mid-March, he's handed off some duties and shifted focus to chasing superintelligence. Though the news was only

item.title: Google Home’s latest update makes Gemini better at understanding your commands
item.description: [The Verge AI] Google is launching another update to its Home app, which is supposed to make controlling your smart home with its Gemini AI assistant "more natural and reliable," according to this week's release notes. With the update, you can describe the type of lighting you want, such as "the color of the ocean

item.title: Singapore stocks end lower on April 2 amid geopolitical uncertainty; STI down 0.6%
item.description: [Straits Times] The benchmark Straits Times Index (STI) lost 28.33 points to finish at 4,947.50

item.title: As AI does more of the work, are we building the right leaders?
item.description: [MarTech] AI is accelerating analysis and reporting, but fewer marketers understand the data underneath. That gap is where leadership risk begins. The post As AI does more of the work, are we building the right leaders? appeared first on MarTech.

item.title: ST Engineering bags $600 million contract to design, supply boat platform systems for Kuwaiti navy
item.description: [Straits Times] This follows a deal for four vessels for the UAE Navy that was also awarded by Abu Dhabi Ship Building.

item.title: 商汤十二年，能否穿越AI周期？
item.description: [钛媒体] AI行业的每一轮周期，都是技术创新与商业落地的交替前行。

item.title: 预测模型Echo面世：检验AI是“预言家”还是“悍跳狼”？
item.description: [钛媒体] Echo不仅让AI学会了预测未来，更重要的是，他们建立了一套，让任何人都能验证“预测准不准”的方法论。

item.title: 国产独立大模型公司的未来，估计是出海+垂类To B
item.description: [钛媒体] MiniMax和智谱的收入模式几乎完全相反，代表了两种截然不同的发展路径。

item.title: 家电巨头，狂蹭AI
item.description: [钛媒体] 但生意还是不好做。

item.title: AI时代，年轻人靠手写信赚得第一桶金
item.description: [钛媒体] “见字如面。”

item.title: 36氪晚报｜AI大模型产品“奇趣”完成千万级融资；阶跃星辰上线Step 3.5 Flash 2603模型；沃尔沃汽车第一季度全球销量同比下降11%
item.description: [36氪] 大公司： 滴滴租车推出“无车必赔”机制，无车率下降15% 为提升履约确定性，滴滴租车推出“无车必赔”机制：因商家原因导致无法用车，平台将协调升级车型，或全额退款并赔付三倍日租金。规则实施后，无车率同期下降15%，平台共赔付预约无车订单三百余次。针对车损纠纷和线下乱收费情况，平台提供免费第三方定损及先行赔付，费用全程线上公示，统一收款，严禁线下加价，违规收费先行赔付，线下乱收费投诉量下降50%。目前超95%的订单实现“无投诉、无纠纷”。 韩国交易所启动SIDECAR机制，暂停KOSDAQ程序化卖出 36氪获悉，韩国交易所启动SIDECAR机制，暂停KOSDAQ程序化卖出。 沃

item.title: 龙虾爆红，Manus 被“困”
item.description: [钛媒体] 从AI新贵到被限制出境的监管对象，两位创业天才的命运一夜反转。

item.title: BioNTech to close vaccine manufacturing plant in Singapore by 2027
item.description: [CNA Tech] The German biotechnology company currently employs 85 people at its manufacturing plant in Tuas.

item.title: 轻舟、元戎秘交上市资料，和Momenta冲刺港股IPO | 36氪独家
item.description: [36氪] 图源视觉中国 文｜肖漫 编辑｜李勤、杨轩 36氪汽车独家获悉，轻舟智航、元戎启行已向香港交易所秘密递交上市材料，计划于今年年内在港交所挂牌。 一位投资行业人士告诉我们，元戎启行在2025年年底就已提交上市资料，比Momenta递表的时间还早两个月。 港股IPO从递表到挂牌需经历递表审核、聆讯、路演与招股等关键阶段，顺利情况下全周期约6-9个月。也就是说，包含轻舟智航、元戎启行和Momenta在内的这批自动驾驶算法公司极有可能在今年下半年迎来IPO爆发潮。 36氪从多位从多位投资行业人士处获悉，Momenta IPO估值预期突破千亿元；轻舟智航最新估值在15亿-20亿美元

item.title: France to announce measures to favour data centres in coming weeks, Finance Minister says
item.description: [CNA Tech]

item.title: Elon Musk's SpaceX set to be worth $1 trillion with planned public listing
item.description: [BBC Technology] The company’s public stock debut is set to be one of the most valuable in history, and could make Musk the world's first trillionaire.

item.title: Gold’s sharp drop sparks surge in first-time buyers in Singapore
item.description: [Straits Times] Retail investors are taking advantage of lower prices to build exposure, OCBC says.

item.title: Meet Junior – the new AI employee and the most driven co-worker you’ll ever work with
item.description: [Straits Times] China's Kuse AI is creating the kind of workplace that feels both inevitable and unsettling.

item.title: 获韶音投资，一家AI公司做了“硬件版OpenClaw” | 36氪独家
item.description: [36氪] 文｜邓咏仪 编辑｜苏建勋 当OpenClaw风暴席卷全球之时，无界方舟创始人曾晓东的反应不是兴奋，而是一种“终于被看见”的感觉。 “OpenClaw本质上是一个Agent框架，底层是一个会写代码的Agent，放在云端服务器或者电脑上。”他对《智能涌现》说，“我们的AIOS本质上也是一个Agent框架，但它是放在硬件端侧的OpenClaw——机器人、耳机、眼镜，都可以在这套OS上运行。” 无界方舟从2024年成立起，就在做这件事。曾晓东给这套范式起了个名字：Vibe Hardware——用自然语言做硬件开发，AI就能自己写程序、调驱动、完成整个应用研发与部署。 目前，无界方舟

item.title: Hong Kong developers sceptical about ambitious tech hub plan
item.description: [Straits Times] Some of them gripe about the risks of oversupply and the difficulty they face assessing investment opportunities.

item.title: 36氪首发 | 00后交大博士做仿生飞行机器人，获启高、奇绩创坛、交大母基金等投资
item.description: [36氪] 作者丨欧雪 编辑丨袁斯来 硬氪获悉，仿生扑翼飞行机器人公司——深圳鹰瞰智翼科技有限公司（下称“鹰瞰智翼”）近期已完成千万元级别天使轮融资，由启高资本领投，奇绩创坛及上海交大母基金跟投。资金将主要用于产品量产、下一代具身智能飞行机器人研发，以及全球首个机器人流体仿真引擎搭建。 鹰瞰智翼2025年3月成立于深圳，是全球第一家专注于具身智能扑翼机器人的公司。创始人陈昊是上海交通大学直博生，博士期间发表四篇顶刊论文。团队核心成员均为上海交大本硕博，来自机器人、控制与机械等相关背景，全员均为00后。 目前，鹰瞰智翼已形成两条产品线： 一是消费级产品“丹丹（Dante）”：面向全球极客

item.title: 8点1氪丨甲骨文凌晨突发邮件裁员3万人；市监局回应张雪机车禁止新手购买；SpaceX据悉秘密提交IPO文件，估值或超过1.75万亿美元
Singapore’s deep-tech push requires ‘calculated bets’, stronger ecosystem: NUS Enterprise’s Benjamin Tee
item.description: [Business Times] Such ventures are not about moving from ‘zero to one’, but about scaling breakthroughs to impact millions, he says

item.title: This time it’s different: LaunchPad @ one-north’s next act signals a maturing startup ecosystem
item.description: [Business Times] The next iteration of it may be more structured and more technologically advanced

item.title: Why the Mac Mini is out of stock: A look at Singapore’s OpenClaw buzz
item.description: [Business Times] A new AI agent has taken the world by storm. Is this a new hype cycle or the start of a tech...
